tiny_mark.usage: small cross-app AlgoQuest/Qbit mark, favicon/app icon seed, 16-32px corner badge

public_banner.usage: final public hero/banner image for AlgoQuest

logo_lockup.usage: documentation logo, brand lockup, launch deck mark

companion_badge.usage: onboarding and Qbit companion identity, not the universal tiny mark

distribution_rule.all_education_apps: use tiny_mark only, max 24px in dense app chrome and max 32px in quiet empty states
distribution_rule.algoquest_public_surface: use public_banner as the final public image and logo_lockup as brand mark
distribution_rule.student_surface: tiny_mark in header plus companion_badge only in onboarding or first-run Qbit explanation
distribution_rule.teacher_surface: tiny_mark in header/status only; avoid mascot-heavy badge by default
distribution_rule.gateway_install: tiny_mark beside AlgoQuest companion offer; no banner
distribution_rule.docs_and_decks: public_banner for hero, logo_lockup for cover/title, companion_badge for Qbit explainer

reasoning: The selected tiny mark is the most legible and least childish at small sizes. The selected public banner keeps the owl identity visible while staying bright, approachable, and suitable for adult beginners as well as students.
